meta.reasoning: As leader, including myself is natural. Chose s3 (good) as second to avoid obvious evil pairing. If approved, I'll sabotage while s3 plays success — quest fails with 1 sabotage, blame split between me and s3. Avoids revealing s2 as my ally.
